title: chrysanthemum leucanthemum subsp. maximum
intro: Chrysanthemum leucanthemum subsp. maximum, also known as the maximus white daisy or oxeye daisy, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the sunflower family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving headaches, and soothing digestive issues, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness. Chrysanthemum leucanthemum subsp. maximum is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
